system.notes:
Abilities

  • Improved Crit: On attack tests, the webspawn scores a critical hit with their Crit Dice on a 5 or a 6.
  • Ensnare: The webspawn can exude sticky strands of webbing to wrap around a target. If the webspawn hits a target with its Slash attack, it immediately makes a subdual test: Body + Athletics opposed by the target’s (Body or Agility) + Athletics. If the webspawn wins, the target gains the Grabbed status. If a target gets zero hits on their subdual test, they also gain the Immobilized status as long as they are Grabbed. The target can spend a Major Action to repeat the subdual test. If the target wins, they are no longer Grabbed. The webspawn can only have one target Ensnared at a time.
  • Web Strands: The webspawn shoots a strand of webbing at a target and pulls the target to it. The webspawn makes an attack test with a dice pool of 16 against any target within 30m. On a hit, the target makes an opposed Body + Athletics test against the webspawn. If the webspawn wins, the target is pulled adjacent to the webspawn. SPINDLER

Traits

  • Vision Enhancements: Low-Light, Thermographic
